caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses is positioned in front of a plain, dark gray background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved top featuring small red floral embroidery and a decorative patterned neckline, paired with a simple dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her garment. As she speaks, she uses hand gestures to emphasize her points, moving her hands in front of her chest and shifting her facial expressions. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a small logo consisting of a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. The scene remains consistent across the sequence, with only the woman's mouth movements and hand positions changing as she continues her presentation.
